channel.title: SwiftUI - Guide on Mobile A11y
channel.description: Recent content in SwiftUI - Guide on Mobile A11y

item.title: SwiftUI Accessibility: Dynamic Type
item.description: Like all accessibility features, Dynamic Type is about customisability. Many of your customers, and maybe even you, are using Dynamic Type without even considering it an accessibility feature. Dynamic type allows iOS users to set the text to a size that they find comfortable to read. This may mean making it a little larger so it’s easier to read for those of us who haven’t yet accepted we might need glasses.
